mapper.select:
SELECT u.userId, u.deptId, d.deptName, u.userName, u.email, u.phone, u.position, u.jobGrade, u.useYn, u.managerYn, u.lastLoginAt FROM user_info u LEFT JOIN dept_info d ON u.deptId = d.deptId
AND u.userId LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userId}, '%')
AND u.userName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userName}, '%')
AND u.deptId = #{deptId}
ORDER BY u.deptId, u.userId
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_info (userId, deptId, userName, password, email, phone, position, jobGrade, useYn, managerYn) VALUES (#{userId}, #{deptId}, #{userName}, #{password}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{position}, #{jobGrade}, #{useYn}, #{managerYn})
mapper.update:
UPDATE user_info
deptId = #{deptId}, userName = #{userName},
password = #{password},
email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, position = #{position}, jobGrade = #{jobGrade}, useYn = #{useYn}, managerYn = #{managerYn}, updatedDate = NOW()
WHERE userId = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_info WHERE userId = #{userId}
SELECT CONCAT('user', LPAD(COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(userId, 5) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1, 3, '0')) FROM user_info WHERE userId REGEXP '^user[0-9]+$'
